ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing size */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Range of bust measurements */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Range of waist measurements */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Range of hips measurements */,
  "girth" TEXT /* Range of girth measurements */,
  "size_type" TEXT /* Type of size (e.g., standard, plus, petite, tall) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the size (e.g., shirts, pants, dresses) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size variant */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the standard size */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the size variant (e.g., 'Long') */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the variant (e.g., length, width) */,
  "additional_measurement" TEXT /* Additional measurement specific to the variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the variant was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_region_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size-region mapping */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "equivalent_size" TEXT /* Equivalent size in the region */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information about the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_region_mapping_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_region_mapping_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "inventory_level" INTEGER /* Current inventory level for the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., tops, bottoms, outerwear) */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Customer's bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Customer's waist measurement */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Customer's hips measurement */,
  "girth" TEXT /* Customer's girth measurement */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Customer's preferred size */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product purchased */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product purchased */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the purchase record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_restocked_at" TEXT /* Last restock date */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)
